data.name: Hentai Nami
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Nami is not just a puzzle game.

It’s a game of desire, tension, and dangerous intimacy that’s hard to resist.

Nami is a confident, seductive woman who always knows how to draw attention. Her smile promises more than words, and every movement is an invitation to go a little further. She plays with your attention, arouses curiosity, and lets you get just as close as you can handle.

As you solve puzzles, you gradually unveil Nami — her body, her mood, her hidden desires. Each level turns up the heat, each detail brings you closer to the moment when she either stops playing… or just begins.

In Hentai Nami there’s no shame — only attraction, control, and the sweet tension that builds with every move.

Game Features:

  • 30 seductive levels — each puzzle reveals a new, more daring and exciting scene.

  • 30 achievements — from the first flirt to the full reveal of her fantasies.

  • Desire Gallery — save your favorite moments and revisit them anytime.

Choose how far you’re willing to go:

  • Easy Mode — flirty glances and gentle teasing.

  • Medium Mode — more exposure, more detail, deeper emotions.

  • Hard Mode — a real challenge for those who want it all.

Every level is a new temptation.
Every puzzle brings you closer.
And only you decide when Hentai Nami fully reveals herself.

data.short_description: Hentai Nami is a sensual puzzle game about temptation and tension. Complete levels, unlock revealing scenes, and gradually get closer to Nami — a woman who can arouse with a single glance and always craves more.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 匈牙利文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core processor with 3.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon RX 560 with 4 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 11 or newer
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
